CWE-89: SQL Injection — unsanitized user input concatenated into SQL queries
CWE-79: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) — user-controlled data rendered without escaping in HTML
CWE-22: Path Traversal — user input used in file paths without sanitization (../)
CWE-78: OS Command Injection — user input passed to shell execution functions
CWE-352: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) — state-changing requests without anti-CSRF tokens
CWE-362: Race Condition (TOCTOU) — time-of-check vs time-of-use in concurrent code
CWE-476: NULL Pointer Dereference — accessing memory through unvalidated null pointer
CWE-190: Integer Overflow / Wraparound — arithmetic without bounds checking
CWE-125: Out-of-bounds Read — buffer read beyond allocated size
CWE-787: Out-of-bounds Write — buffer write beyond allocated size (heap/stack overflow)
CWE-502: Deserialization of Untrusted Data — unsafe deserialization enabling RCE
CWE-611: XML External Entity (XXE) Injection — external entity references in XML parsing
CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) — server-side requests to user-controlled URLs
CWE-285: Improper Authorization — missing or bypassable access control checks
CWE-798: Hard-coded Credentials — secrets embedded in source code
CWE-327: Broken Cryptographic Algorithm — use of weak or obsolete crypto primitives
CWE-20: Improper Input Validation — missing validation at trust boundary
CWE-400: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption — missing rate limiting or quota enforcement
CWE-601: Open Redirect — URL redirect to user-controlled destination
